test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient. 521 tests pass (2 DB-gated skips), re-run from worktree. All AC1-AC4 and security-remediation ACs have direct test coverage: identity resolution, 429 envelope, new-account tier, link-count limiter, IThrottleStore seam, env var validation, ReDoS regression (non-vacuous), evasion detection, and fail-closed on store error.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate. api-conventions.md new-account tier statement matches throttle.guard.ts:66 (const null, ST9 activates). Link scanner documented as linear indexOf with 256 KB cap. All five THROTTLE_* vars in launch.md and .env.example with ranges and cross-field note. No doc drift.
